evals.name: private-markdown-output
evals.prompt: 总结昨天 00:00-24:00 的 Codex 和 Claude Code 工作，输出 Markdown。
expected: uses all local logs for a single full local day
states that generated summaries are private

evals.name: major-minor-structure
evals.prompt: 大点简单，小点写基本步骤和遇到的坑，不要太具体。

evals.name: secret-redaction
evals.prompt: 日志里出现 token、app password、webhook URL 时也要总结。
expected: does not commit or upload raw logs
